title: How did Sam get his money back?

meanings.usage: 指农村或小镇，比 town 小
用于装钱和信用卡的小皮具
常用复数形式，指存起来的钱
邮寄信件和包裹的地方
复数形式为 thieves，指偷窃的人
形容人不欺骗，实话实说
wrap up 表示包裹起来
用于阅读新闻或包裹东西
表示某物内部装有某物
return sth. to sb. 表示归还某物给某人
a sum of money 表示一笔钱
front door 指前门，建筑物入口

phrases.phrase: take savings to the post office

examples.en: She took her savings to the post office to send them to her son.
examples.zh: 她把积蓄带到邮局寄给儿子。

phrases.usage: 一定曾经是（对过去的肯定推测）

examples.en: The wallet must have been found by someone.
examples.zh: 钱包一定是被某人发现了。

examples.en: The package was wrapped up in newspaper.
In time, all the money was paid back.
examples.zh: 最终，所有的钱都还回来了。

examples.en: He paid back the money he had borrowed.
A large sum of money was lost.
Three months passed by before the wallet was found.
examples.zh: 三个月过去了，钱包才被找到。

examples.en: The wallet contained the money together with a note.
examples.zh: 钱包里有钱和一张纸条。

phrases.usage: 只是百分之五十的小偷

examples.en: I'm only 50 per cent a thief now!
examples.zh: 我现在只是百分之五十的小偷！

examples.en: The whole village soon learnt that money had been lost.
examples.zh: 整个村庄很快得知钱丢了。

grammar.title: must have + 过去分词（对过去的肯定推测）
grammar.definition: 表示对过去发生的事情的肯定推测，意为'一定已经...'
grammar.structure: 主语 + must have + 过去分词 + ...
grammar.usage: 用于根据证据或理由推断过去发生的事情，语气肯定

examples.en: Sam was sure that the wallet must have been found by one of the villagers.
examples.zh: 萨姆确信钱包一定是被某个村民发现了。

examples.en: She must have received my letter.

grammar.title: 过去完成时（Past Perfect Tense）
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作
grammar.usage: 用于叙述过去事件时，表示先发生的动作，常与一般过去时连用

examples.en: Sam had lost his wallet while taking his savings to the post office.
examples.zh: 萨姆在把积蓄带到邮局的路上丢了钱包。

examples.en: Three months passed after the wallet had been lost.

grammar.title: 被动语态（Passive Voice）
grammar.definition: 强调动作的承受者而非执行者
grammar.usage: 当动作的承受者更重要或不知道执行者时使用

examples.en: The wallet must have been found.
examples.zh: 钱包一定被（某人）发现了。

examples.en: All Sam's money was paid back in this way.
examples.zh: 萨姆所有的钱都以这种方式被还了回来。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + must have + 过去分词

original.en: The wallet must have been found by one of the villagers.
original.zh: 钱包一定是被某个村民发现了。

imitations.en: The book must have been taken by Tom.
imitations.zh: 那本书一定是被汤姆拿走了。

imitations.en: She must have forgotten our appointment.
imitations.zh: 她一定忘了我们的约定。

sentencePatterns.pattern: It had been + 过去分词 + in/with...

original.en: It had been wrapped up in newspaper and it contained half the money.
original.zh: 它用报纸包着，里面有丢失金额的一半。

imitations.en: The letter had been hidden in the drawer.
The money had been placed in a safe box.

sentencePatterns.pattern: In time, + 主语 + was/were + 过去分词

original.en: In time, all Sam's money was paid back in this way.
original.zh: 最终，萨姆所有的钱都以这种方式还了回来。

imitations.en: In time, the problem was solved.
In time, the truth was known by everyone.
imitations.zh: 最终，真相被所有人知道了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: Only + 数字/百分比 + 名词/名词短语

original.zh: 只是百分之五十的小偷！

imitations.en: Only 20 per cent of the work is done.
imitations.zh: 只完成了百分之二十的工作。

imitations.en: Only half a loaf of bread left.
